hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight text-stone-900 font-semibold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight text-stone-900 font-medium

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing: p-6 or p-8 for cards, gap-6 for dashboard grids.
layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B (Control Room): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Flat backgrounds with 1px border. No excessive shadows.
layout.marketing_grid: Mode A (Tetris Grid): Asymmetric, large breathable sections for the public site.
layout.alignment: Left-align complex data forms and paragraphs. Top-level headers can be centered if balancing the layout.

components.buttons: Solid primary color for primary actions. Minimal border radius (rounded-md). hover:bg-opacity-90 transition-all.
components.cards: Flat Solid surfaces. bg-white, 1px border-stone-200, shadow-sm. Internal padding p-6.
components.tables: Shadcn based. Dense data. Horizontal scrollable for pawn items. Frozen headers. Include inline filters for active/redeemed/overdue/auction states.
components.forms: Shadcn based. Use distinct fieldsets for Timor-Leste geography (municipality, posto, suco, aldeia).
components.navigation: Sticky header with backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70. Clear separation between public site links and admin dashboard CTA.

media.description: Timor Leste Dili Landscape for the public-facing landing page hero to establish local trust.
High-end watch, representing electronics/jewelry in the auction and warehouse sections.
Warehouse garage with vehicles, representing the pawned cars/motorcycles storage.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-contract-btn', data-testid='client-id-input').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA or minimum WCAG AA. Interactive elements must highlight clearly on focus/hover.

specific_flows.dashboard_kpis: Cards showing Total clients, Active contracts, Total loan amount (USD), Total payments, Profit/interest summary, Overdue contracts.
specific_flows.client_registration: Forms including fields for BI/Electoral/Passport, phone, address, municipality, posto, suco, aldeia.
specific_flows.pawn_item_management: Tabs or separate forms for Car, Motorcycle, Electronic. Vehicles require plate, chassis, fuel %. Electronics require brand, model, serial. Include document/photo upload dropzones.
specific_flows.contract_module: Auto-generate CTR-YYYY-####. Loan amount input, interest rate select (10/15%), date pickers for contract and due date.
specific_flows.payment_module: Input for full/partial/interest-only. Display remaining balance. Provide print receipt CTA.
specific_flows.bilingual: UI copy structured to allow easy translation file mapping (EN/PT toggle in header).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React (.js files, not .tsx), Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
Implement a hybrid fullstack architecture: an admin dashboard and public marketing pages.
Update tailwind.config.js to include fonts 'Outfit' and 'Work Sans' and the specified organic color palette.
Ensure the dashboard uses a 'Control Room' grid layout for the 6 requested KPIs.
Implement the complex inventory tables for pawn items with horizontal scroll and precise column headers.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, table rows).
Create a bilingual toggle component (EN/PT) that updates state/context.
Never use placeholder image services. Use the exact media URLs provided in the media section.
Forms must handle the specific Timor-Leste address taxonomy (municipality, posto, suco, aldeia).
